mapper.sql: o.id, o.order_no AS orderNo, o.total_amount AS totalAmount, o.discount_amount AS discountAmount, o.final_amount AS finalAmount, o.payment_type AS paymentType, o.status, o.note, o.ordered_at AS orderedAt
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_no AS orderNo, total_amount AS totalAmount, discount_amount AS discountAmount, final_amount AS finalAmount, payment_type AS paymentType, status, note, ordered_at AS orderedAt FROM orders ORDER BY ordered_at DESC

SELECT oi.id, oi.order_id AS orderId, oi.menu_id AS menuId, oi.qty, oi.unit_price AS unitPrice, oi.subtotal, m.name AS menuName FROM order_items oi LEFT JOIN menus m ON oi.menu_id = m.id WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId}
SELECT id, category_id AS categoryId, name, description, price, cost, is_available AS isAvailable FROM menus WHERE is_available = 1 ORDER BY category_id, name
